title: Textarea
description: Multi-line text area with autoresize, character counter, helper/error text and all the visual variants of Input.

basic.title: Basic usage
basic.desc: Simple textarea with label, placeholder and initial rows.
basic.label: Comment

autoresize.title: Autoresize + counter
autoresize.desc: Grows with content up to maxRows and shows a character counter.
autoresize.label: Bio

error.title: Error
error.desc: errorText marks the field as invalid and replaces helperText.
error.label: Description

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.desc: Disabled state preserving the visual value.

props.label: Visible label above the textarea.
props.helperText: Helper text below the textarea. Hidden when errorText is present.
props.errorText: Error message that marks the textarea as invalid.
props.color: Semantic color applied to the focus state.
props.radius: Corner radius. Inherits from ModoProvider when omitted.
props.clearable: Shows an ✕ button to clear the value.
props.maxLength: Maximum length. Activates the counter if showCounter.
props.autoresize: Grows automatically with content up to maxRows.
props.name: HTML name attribute.
props.ariaLabel: Accessible name when there is no visible label.

emits.updateModelValue: Emitted on every value change (syncs v-model).
emits.focus: Emitted when the textarea receives focus.
emits.blur: Emitted when the textarea loses focus.
emits.clear: Emitted when the clear button is clicked (clearable).
